article_id: 1. Defence of the Republic of South Sudan is an honour and a duty of every citizen.

article_id: 95. Establishment and Composition of the Executive
text_snippet: There shall be established in the Republic of South Sudan a National Executive consisting of the President, Vice President, Ministers, and Deputy Ministers.
